enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Bad Boy?

The song Bad Boy conveys a fun and playful vibe, celebrating a carefree attitude and the joy of life.

What is the plot context of the movie Alex Pandian?

Alex Pandian is an action-comedy film that revolves around the adventures of its titular character, showcasing his charm and wit.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the energetic vocals of Baba Sehgal and Priya Himesh.

Who composed the music for Bad Boy?

The music for Bad Boy was composed by Devi Sri Prasad, known for his catchy and vibrant tunes.

When was Bad Boy released?

Bad Boy was released on December 13, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Bad Boy from Alex Pandian is a lively and upbeat track that encapsulates the spirit of celebration and fun. It features a playful interaction between the singers, Baba Sehgal and Priya Himesh, making it a perfect fit for party occasions. The energetic beats composed by Devi Sri Prasad amplify the vibrant mood, encouraging listeners to dance and enjoy. Overall, the song conveys a sense of joy and carefree living, resonating well with the film's adventurous theme.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Bad Boy from Alex Pandian is an electrifying duet that perfectly captures the vibrant energy of celebration. With the dynamic vocals of Baba Sehgal and Priya Himesh, complemented by Devi Sri Prasad's catchy beats, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the fun and excitement that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Greetings to everyone, greetings to everyone. For those who see me, a double greeting to everyone. Greetings, greetings, greetings, greetings. Hey, touching the dog, a debate is happening. Whatever changes, everyone will get a hit, hit, hit, hit, hit.
Dude, seeing you makes my heart happy. Relax, buddy, I’m now settled here in this place.
I am a Bad Bad Bad Bad Boy. I am a Bad Bad Bad Bad Boy. I am a Bad boy. I am a Bad boy.
In the government, they say I am half and four. Look, look, look, they are saying.
Hey, is there a good person? No, the one who hits doesn’t get caught. No, no, no, doesn’t get caught.
The rowdy is a good guy, all mixed up. Billa, the language is all my friends, they are saying.
I am a Bad Bad Bad Bad Boy. I am a Bad Bad Bad Bad Boy. I am a Bad boy. I am a Bad boy.
The one who comes is laughing like a joker, making a boom, bad boy, bad boy.
With a magnet, I get attracted like chocolate, going away, bad boy, bad boy.
Hey, my guru said they have changed me into a villain, look, look, look, they have changed me.
Hey, inside me is MGR, back then they used to look at me, look, look, look, they used to look.
Now, full life, you too are a king in this land.
Dude, think about this life, do you need money?
I am a Bad Bad Bad Bad Boy. I am a Bad Bad Bad Bad Boy. I am a Bad boy. I am a Bad boy.
